'''âv-r-h''' ('''varaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stagnate|stagnate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stagnate|stagnate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-r-h
|-
! Lemma
| varaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:varahithi|varahithi]] || [[word:varahiji|varahiji]] || [[word:varahishi|varahishi]] || [[word:varahi|varahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:varahuthuth|varahuthuth]] || [[word:varahujuj|varahujuj]] || [[word:varahushush|varahushush]] || [[word:varah|varah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:varahuthu|varahuthu]] || [[word:varahuju|varahuju]] || [[word:varahushu|varahushu]] || [[word:varahu|varahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:varahufuth|varahufuth]] || [[word:varahufuj|varahufuj]] || [[word:varahufush|varahufush]] || [[word:varahuf|varahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:varahethe|varahethe]] || [[word:varaheje|varaheje]] || [[word:varaheshe|varaheshe]] || [[word:varahe|varahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:varahothoth|varahothoth]] || [[word:varahojoj|varahojoj]] || [[word:varahoshosh|varahoshosh]] || [[word:varah|varah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:varahotho|varahotho]] || [[word:varahojo|varahojo]] || [[word:varahosho|varahosho]] || [[word:varaho|varaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:varahofoth|varahofoth]] || [[word:varahofoj|varahofoj]] || [[word:varahofosh|varahofosh]] || [[word:varahof|varahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:varahĂŠthĂŠ|varahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:varahĂŠjĂŠ|varahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:varahĂŠshĂŠ|varahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:varahĂŠ|varahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:varahathath|varahathath]] || [[word:varahajaj|varahajaj]] || [[word:varahashash|varahashash]] || [[word:varah|varah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:varahatha|varahatha]] || [[word:varahaja|varahaja]] || [[word:varahasha|varahasha]] || [[word:varaha|varaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:varahafath|varahafath]] || [[word:varahafaj|varahafaj]] || [[word:varahafash|varahafash]] || [[word:varahaf|varahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:varahasha|varahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govarahasha|govarahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivarahasha|gokivarahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:varahnĂŒsha|varahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govarahnknĂŒsha|govarahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivarahnĂŒsha|gokivarahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:varahshĂ«sha|varahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govarahnkshĂ«sha|govarahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivarahshĂ«sha|gokivarahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:varahrosha|varahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govarahnkrosha|govarahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivarahrosha|gokivarahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:varahmusha|varahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govarahnkmusha|govarahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivarahmusha|gokivarahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:varahsherasha|varahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govarahnksherasha|govarahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivarahsherasha|gokivarahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:varahngasha|varahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govarahnkngasha|govarahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivarahngasha|gokivarahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:varahyasha|varahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govarahnkyasha|govarahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivarahyasha|gokivarahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:varahyamasha|varahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govarahnkyamasha|govarahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivarahyamasha|gokivarahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:varahnĂŒshĂ«sha|varahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govarahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|govarahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivarahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivarahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:varahnĂŒrosha|varahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govarahnknĂŒrosha|govarahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivarahnĂŒrosha|gokivarahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:varahnĂŒmusha|varahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govarahnknĂŒmusha|govarahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivarahnĂŒmusha|gokivarahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:varahshĂ«nĂŒsha|varahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govarahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govarahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivarahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivarahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:varahshĂ«rosha|varahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govarahnkshĂ«rosha|govarahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivarahshĂ«rosha|gokivarahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:varahshĂ«musha|varahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govarahnkshĂ«musha|govarahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivarahshĂ«musha|gokivarahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:varahronĂŒsha|varahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govarahnkronĂŒsha|govarahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivarahronĂŒsha|gokivarahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:varahroshĂ«sha|varahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govarahnkroshĂ«sha|govarahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivarahroshĂ«sha|gokivarahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:varahromusha|varahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govarahnkromusha|govarahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivarahromusha|gokivarahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:varahmunĂŒsha|varahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govarahnkmunĂŒsha|govarahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivarahmunĂŒsha|gokivarahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:varahmushĂ«sha|varahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govarahnkmushĂ«sha|govarahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivarahmushĂ«sha|gokivarahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:varahmurosha|varahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govarahnkmurosha|govarahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivarahmurosha|gokivarahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:varah|varah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠrĂŠh|vĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovarah|hovarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠrĂŠh|hovĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovarah|hohovarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠrĂŠh|hohovĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvarah|nĂŒvarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠrĂŠh|nĂŒvĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvarah|nĂŒnĂŒvarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠrĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvarah|nĂŻvarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠrĂŠh|nĂŻvĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvarah|nĂŻnĂŻvarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠrĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvarah|luvarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠrĂŠh|luvĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvarah|luluvarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠrĂŠh|luluvĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livarah|livarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠrĂŠh|livĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivarah|lilivarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠrĂŠh|lilivĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovarah|kovarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠrĂŠh|kovĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovarah|kokovarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠrĂŠh|kokovĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevarah|kevarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠrĂŠh|kevĂŠrĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevarah|kekevarah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠrĂŠh|kekevĂŠrĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
